creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text:
I use Poudriere to build packages for my 11.1 systems.  Currently vte3 is not building, the error reported is:

vte.cc:80:22: error: static declaration of 'round' follows non-static declaration
static inline double round(double x) {
                     ^
/usr/include/math.h:312:8: note: previous declaration is here
double  round(double);
        ^
1 warning generated.

then it fails and gdm, gnome3, etc don't build.
